message: ci: align Linux/Windows toolchains with Swift 6.2

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ jobs:
     strategy:
       matrix:
         os: [macos-14, macos-15, macos-latest, ubuntu-22.04]  # Windows still needs work
-        swift-version: ['6.0']
+        swift-version: ['6.2']
         
     steps:
     - name: Checkout
@@ -93,14 +93,14 @@ jobs:
     - name: Setup Swift
       uses: SwiftyLab/setup-swift@latest
       with:
-        swift-version: '6.0'
+        swift-version: '6.2'
       if: runner.os != 'Windows'
         
     - name: Setup Swift on Windows
       uses: compnerd/gha-setup-swift@main
       with:
-        swift-version: swift-6.0-release
-        swift-build: 6.0-RELEASE
+        swift-version: swift-6.2-release
+        swift-build: 6.2-RELEASE
       if: runner.os == 'Windows'
         
     - name: Build Examples

@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ jobs:
   test-linux-ubuntu-22:
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
     name: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS
-    container: swift:6.0
+    container: swift:6.2
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       
@@ -69,7 +69,7 @@ jobs:
   test-linux-ubuntu-24:
     runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
     name: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS
-    container: swift:6.0
+    container: swift:6.2
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4

@@ -85,7 +85,7 @@ jobs:
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
-        swift-version: ['6.0', '5.10']
+        swift-version: ['6.2', '5.10']
 
     steps:
     - name: Checkout
